description: Account in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. late 12th or early 13th century. Mentions names such as [...] b. Barakāt; Abū Naṣr b. Khalaf; Ibn al-Aanbarī; his neighbor Mufaḍḍal; Efrayim; Abū l-Ḥasan al-Skandarī; Abū l-Riḍā; the boy of Munajjā; Ibn al-ʿAdanī; Abū l-Faḍl; Abū l-Ḥasan al-[...]; Abū l-Ḥasan al-Ṣāʾigh; Dāʾūd al-Ṣabbāgh; Abū ʿImrān al-Sharābī; Faḍḍāl al-Ṣabbāgh; Abū Saʿd al-Ḥarīrī.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
